title: Peter Fendrich
text: Home * People * Peter Fendrich Peter Fendrich [1] Jean-Peter Fendrich , a Swedish engineer, computer scientist, in 2014 retired from Volvo IT [2] . As avocational computer chess programmer, Peter Fendrich is author of the computer chess programs Terra and Alaric .
